description: Pillar weights by maturity stage. Order is [adoption_momentum, institutional_confidence, financial_evolution, thesis_integrity, des]. Weights must sum to 1.0 within each profile. v1.1.0 splits 'standard_compounder' into 'mature_compounder' and 'growth_compounder' so peer-relative percentiles benchmark like-for-like (AAPL/PG/KO vs. each other, NVDA/MU/AVGO vs. each other). 'standard_compounder' remains as a fallback for tickers not explicitly reclassified. v1.2.0 (Tier 5 #27 Phase 5) adds five crypto profiles for the expanded 10-asset universe: 'layer_1_alt' (ADA/AVAX/DOT — adoption-leaning alt-L1s), 'oracle_defi' (LINK — fee-revenue + adoption), 'layer_2' (POL — scaling solution), 'payments' (XRP — institutional-flow heavy), and 'meme' (DOGE — adoption-dominant, low financial-fundamentals weight). v1.3.0 adds the 'financial' equity profile for the universe-expand financial-sector cohort (BX/CB/CME/ICE/KKR/MCO/PGR/PNC — insurers, exchanges, asset managers, a bank): mature_compounder baseline with 0.05 shifted from adoption_momentum (search/product-adoption signal is weak for financials) into financial_evolution (statement fundamentals are the core lens; the Financial pillar already benchmarks bank cohorts separately).

adaptive_overrides.comment: Default OFF until backfill history + walk-forward CV both qualify. Flip 'enabled' to true after a tune run returns recommendation='ship'.
